hero.label: Technical Artist · Game Art Generalist · Paris
hero.descriptionHtml:
A generalist technical artist focused on creating video games, with a fascination for building custom tools for each project and for stylized hand-made work.

I specialize in Unity, with a deep knowledge of its less conventional features, and I am also comfortable with Unreal Engine 5.
hero.metaHtml:
Master's Degree (Arts and Image Technologies)
Available for freelance work, internships and collaborations

Paris & Remote

copies: WebGL prototypes and playable experiences hosted on the site.

contact.copyHtml: For a project, a collaboration, or a question, here are the best ways to reach me.

hero.label: Test bed
hero.descriptionHtml: Many games and a few addons made over time, some in WebGL, most for Windows. Some are more like technical demos, others are more complete experiences.
A detailed overview of my game art specialties, from concept to final render. Each section presents the different production stages and the techniques used.
